steps.title: Evaluate the expression as a list
steps.content: Use Desmos list evaluation for the table. Choice D has $x$-values $442$, $441$, $440$ and $y$-values $0$, $-2$, $-4$. Enter those as lists and compute $2x_1-y_1$.

steps.title: Check the inequality
steps.content: Desmos returns $[884,884,884]$ for $2x_1-y_1$. Since every value is greater than $883$, every row in choice D satisfies the inequality.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: The other tables fail because at least one row gives a value that is not greater than $883$. Choice D is correct.
